raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"Making the draft stronger centrally involves sharpening the thesis, gap, and contribution claim above the sentence level.","R1.2":"The delegation implies improving the argumentative force of the paper by checking whether the premises, method description, and conclusions cohere.","R1.3":"Because the artifact makes empirical performance and generalization claims, strengthening it requires aligning those claims with the reported evaluation results.","R1.5":"The request reasonably includes improving the section-level narrative arc from problem to method to evidence to contribution.","R1.6":"A broad request to make prose stronger centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and register.","RX.1":"Any projection of strengthening must preserve explicit uncertainty where the artifact lacks enough information to justify confidence.","RX.2":"The artifact contains novelty, clinical utility, and transfer claims, so avoiding overclaiming is load-bearing.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within projection of requested responsibilities rather than performing the requested rewrite.","RX.4":"Because the artifact concerns clinical variant interpretation, avoiding downstream harm from inflated or unsafe claims is essential.","RX.5":"The projection must preserve traceability to the delegation and the artifact’s stated claims."}}

rationale.R1.1: Making the draft stronger centrally involves sharpening the thesis, gap, and contribution claim above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.2: The delegation implies improving the argumentative force of the paper by checking whether the premises, method description, and conclusions cohere.
rationale.R1.3: Because the artifact makes empirical performance and generalization claims, strengthening it requires aligning those claims with the reported evaluation results.
rationale.R1.5: The request reasonably includes improving the section-level narrative arc from problem to method to evidence to contribution.
rationale.R1.6: A broad request to make prose stronger centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and register.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of strengthening must preserve explicit uncertainty where the artifact lacks enough information to justify confidence.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains novelty, clinical utility, and transfer claims, so avoiding overclaiming is load-bearing.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within projection of requested responsibilities rather than performing the requested rewrite.
rationale.RX.4: Because the artifact concerns clinical variant interpretation, avoiding downstream harm from inflated or unsafe claims is essential.
rationale.RX.5: The projection must preserve traceability to the delegation and the artifact’s stated claims.
